title: Bubble Chart Schema
description: Intermediate representation for bubble chart diagrams. LLM extracts data from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it. Each data point has X, Y coordinates and a size value mapped to bubble area.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a bubble chart. Must always be 'bubble'.

title.description: Chart title, displayed at the top of the rendered page.
examples: Product Comparison by Price, Satisfaction & Market Share

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title.
examples: 气泡大小代表市场份额

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules.

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default. SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid is not supported for bubble charts.

series.description: Data series. Each series contains bubble data points with X, Y coordinates and a size value. Bubble size is mapped to area (not radius) for correct visual proportion.

axis.description: Axis configuration for both X and Y axes. Both are numeric value axes for bubble charts.

sizeRange.description: Controls how the size data value maps to bubble radius in pixels. Size is mapped via area (not linear radius) for correct visual proportion.

minRadius.description: Minimum bubble radius in pixels. Maps to the smallest size value in the data.

maxRadius.description: Maximum bubble radius in pixels. Maps to the largest size value in the data.

legend.description: Legend configuration. Auto-generated from series names if not provided. Bubble charts also include a size legend indicator.

colors.description: Optional color overrides for the style's environment colors (background, text, etc.). Does NOT affect data bubble colors — use series[].color for that.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. author field is for internal tracking only and MUST NOT be rendered into the output.

seriesItem.description: A data series containing bubble data points with X, Y coordinates and a size value.

name.description: Series name displayed in the legend.

color.description: Optional color override for all bubbles in this series. Must be 6-digit hex (#RRGGBB). If omitted, uses the chart palette.

data.description: Data points in this series. Each has X and Y numeric coordinates plus a size value (> 0) mapped to bubble area.

bubbleDataPoint.description: A single bubble data point with X and Y coordinates and a size value.

x.description: X-axis value. Must be a finite number.

y.description: Y-axis value. Must be a finite number.

size.description: Size value mapped to bubble area (not radius). Must be > 0. Larger values produce larger bubbles.

label.description: Optional label displayed near the bubble.
